Another milestone unlocked for Solarich Solar! 🌞

We are proud to announce the successful contract signing for a brand-new solar installation project 🔥

This deal was successfully closed through the dedication and expertise of our Sales Manager, Ms. Charmaine, ensuring a smooth and professional transaction from start to finish 👏

This partnership marks the beginning of a smarter, more sustainable future—powered by clean and renewable energy 💡⚡️

From planning to execution, our team is committed to delivering top-quality solar solutions that bring long-term savings and energy independence to every home 🏡

We sincerely thank our valued client for choosing Solarich 🤝

Your trust inspires us to continue delivering excellence in every installation.

📍 Stay tuned as we transform this site into a fully solar-powered property!

KEEPING SOLAR SYSTEMS AT PEAK PERFORMANCE ☀️🔧
Even the best solar systems need proper care—and we’ve got it covered!
📍 SITE: Cerujano Residence
📍 LOCATION: Rizal
🛠 SERVICE PERFORMED:
▪️ Professional Panel Cleaning
▪️ Full System Inspection & Performance Check
Over time, dust, dirt, and debris can reduce solar efficiency. Through thorough cleaning and detailed system diagnostics, we help restore optimal energy production and ensure everything is running safely and efficiently.
✔️ Improved energy output
✔️ Early detection of issues
✔️ Longer system lifespan
Handled by our expert in-house technicians—precision, care, and quality service guaranteed.
Because solar isn’t just about installation… it’s about long-term performance.
